remarks: HIGHEST AND BEST OFFERS BY 7PM ON TUESDAY 7/14.  Attention investors, builders, flippers, and buyers looking to create their dream home! This is a rare opportunity to transform a well-located Stamford property into something truly special. The roof and HVAC system are only approximately nine years old leaving the next owner free to focus on designing and renovating the interior and exterior to their own taste. The home is being sold as-is and requires a complete cosmetic renovation, making it an ideal project for those looking to build instant equity through thoughtful improvements. Whether you're planning a high-end resale, a long-term investment, or a personalized forever home, the possibilities here are exceptional.  Conveniently located close to shopping, restaurants, parks, schools, Metro-North, and major commuting routes. Opportunities like this are becoming increasingly difficult to find in Stamford. Bring your vision, your contractor, and your imagination-this could be your next great project! Property is under camera surveillance.
